initialValue:
- name: Validate orders API configuration
  ansible.builtin.command: /usr/local/bin/orders-api --check-config /etc/orders-api/config.yml

- name: Restart orders API after valid configuration
  ansible.builtin.systemd_service:
    name: devpolaris-orders-api
    state: restarted

expected.label: validation task keeps the documented command
read-only validation does not report a change
validation return code remains available for the gate
restart still targets the orders API service
restart depends on successful host-local validation
